**Body:**  
Hi [First Name],  

We noticed that your account details may need an update. To ensure your financial information is accurate and secure, we'd appreciate it if you could verify your details at your earliest convenience.  

Your account details are important for:

By verifying your details, you help protect your financial information and ensure that your account remains in good standing.  

We've made it easy – simply click the button below to verify your details in just a few clicks.  

[Verify My Details]  

Thank you for being a part of our community. We're here to help you bank with confidence and security.  

Warm regards,  
[Bank Name]  
[Customer Support Team]

**Subject Line:**
****Verify Your Account Details – Ensure Your Financial Security**

**Body:**
Dear [First Name],

We noticed some recent changes to your account details. To ensure your financial security and prevent any unexpected disruptions, please take a moment to verify your account information.

Your account details are crucial to:
- Verify your contact information
- Confirm your account preferences
- Update your security settings

By verifying your account details, you're helping to protect your financial information and ensure that your account remains active and secure.

We understand that your time is valuable, which is why we've made this process quick and straightforward. Please verify your details within 24 hours to avoid any potential issues.

If you have any questions or need assistance, our customer support team is here to help. 

Thank you for being a part of our community.
Best regards,
[Bank Name]
[Bank Contact Information]
